name: CyberGordon API
description: CyberGordon is a cyber reputation check service that aggregates threat and risk information about observables (IP addresses, domains, URLs, file hashes, emails) from multiple security intelligence engines. Submit observables for analysis and retrieve aggregated results from engines including IPinfo, AbuseIPDB, VirusTotal, urlscan.io, Google Safe Browsing, GreyNoise, Pulsedive, and more. Results include risk assessment with suspicious/malicious indicators and links to original sources. Results are retained for 7 days.
